name: Colorado Federal Savings Bank
description_short: Colorado Federal Savings Bank offers nationwide banking solutions including residential construction lending, savings accounts, CDs, and treasury/cash management services for individuals and businesses.
description_long: Colorado Federal Savings Bank (CFSB) operates as a full-service bank providing comprehensive financial solutions across residential real estate, consumer banking, and business services. The institution markets itself as 'The Builders' Bank,' positioning construction lending as a core competency alongside traditional banking products. Based on their website presence at coloradofederalbank.com, they serve property owners, builders, developers, and consumers seeking competitive deposit products and business banking solutions. The bank emphasizes nationwide reach, suggesting they accept customers beyond Colorado despite their regional name. Their service model combines specialized real estate lending expertise with standard retail banking offerings, targeting both individual depositors and commercial clients requiring construction or development financing. CFSB appears to operate within the traditional banking model, offering FDIC-insured deposit accounts and business solutions rather than alternative lending or credit services. Their marketing emphasizes three core values: efficiency, transparency, and competitive pricing. The website indicates they provide residential construction lending as a primary differentiator, appealing to builders and real estate professionals seeking specialized loan products. Treasury and cash management services suggest institutional-grade business banking capabilities for commercial clients. The competitive positioning on rates and fees indicates they operate in the standard banking market rather than serving underbanked or credit-challenged populations. Without detailed fee schedules, account minimums, or rate disclosures on the visible homepage, prospective customers would need to contact the bank directly for specific pricing and product terms.
services: Real estate lending for property owners
pros: Specialized residential construction lending expertise marketed as core competency ('The Builders' Bank')
Nationwide banking operations despite regional name, expanding geographic reach
Competitive savings and CD rates explicitly offered
Treasury and cash management services for business clients requiring scalable solutions
Emphasis on transparency as stated core value
Full-service banking model combining consumer deposits with commercial lending
Efficient service delivery highlighted as organizational priority
cons: Limited product information on homepage—no specific rates, fees, or account terms disclosed
Unclear minimum deposit requirements or account opening processes from available website content
No mention of digital banking capabilities, mobile apps, or online account management features
Limited customer service details—no phone numbers, branch locations, or support hours visible on homepage
Construction lending focus may indicate limited product diversity for non-real-estate consumers

contact.address: 8400 E Prentice Ave, Greenwood Village, CO 80111

best_for: Residential builders and real estate developers seeking specialized construction financing
Property owners looking for construction loans with bank relationships experienced in development projects
Business owners requiring treasury and cash management solutions
Consumers seeking competitive savings and CD products from a traditional bank
diagnosis: Colorado Federal Savings Bank is best suited for builders, developers, and real estate professionals seeking specialized construction lending from a traditional bank, as well as consumers and businesses seeking competitive deposit products and cash management services. The primary caveat is that the publicly available website provides minimal detail on rates, fees, minimums, and digital banking capabilities, requiring direct contact with the bank to evaluate competitive positioning and suitability.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 8400 E Prentice Ave, Greenwood Village, CO 80111
